parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Триггер: вызов из диспетчера').item.json

return {
  json: {
    taskKey: String(input.task_key || '').trim(),
    chatId: String(input.chat_id || '').trim(),
    originalPrompt: String(input.original_prompt || '').trim(),
    acceptanceCriteria: String(input.acceptance_criteria || '').trim(),
    resultText: String(input.result_text || '').trim(),
    workerAlias: String(input.worker_alias || '').trim(),
    workerBaseUrl: String(input.worker_base_url || '').trim(),
    authorizationHeader: String(input.authorization_header || '').trim(),
    sessionCreatePath: String(input.session_create_path || '').trim(),
    sessionStatusPath: String(input.session_status_path || '').trim(),
    messageListPath: String(input.message_list_path || '').trim(),
    promptAsyncPath: String(input.prompt_async_path || '').trim(),
  },
}

const sessionResponse = $input.first().json
const sessionId = String(
  sessionResponse.sessionId || sessionResponse.id || sessionResponse.data?.id || ''
).trim()

const launchError = sessionResponse.error
  ? String(sessionResponse.error.message || sessionResponse.error)
  : sessionId
    ? ''
    : 'OpenCode не вернул session id.'

const input = $('Разбираем входные данные').item.json

return {
  json: {
    sessionId,
    launchError,
    taskKey: input.taskKey,
    chatId: input.chatId,
    originalPrompt: input.originalPrompt,
    acceptanceCriteria: input.acceptanceCriteria,
    resultText: input.resultText,
    workerAlias: input.workerAlias,
    workerBaseUrl: input.workerBaseUrl,
    authorizationHeader: input.authorizationHeader,
    sessionStatusPath: input.sessionStatusPath,
    messageListPath: input.messageListPath,
    promptAsyncPath: input.promptAsyncPath,
  },
}

// Формируем промпт верификации для OpenCode с защитой от переполнения.

const MAX_SECTION = 5000
const trunc = (s) => {
  const str = String(s || '').trim()
  return str.length > MAX_SECTION ? str.slice(0, MAX_SECTION) + '\n... [TRUNCATED]' : str
}

const input = $('Нормализуем ответ сессии').item.json

const verifyPrompt = `VERIFICATION TASK — you MUST perform a THOROUGH, REAL verification. You CANNOT skip steps. You CANNOT guess. You MUST produce actual evidence.

ORIGINAL TASK:
${trunc(input.originalPrompt)}

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (verify EVERY point — no exceptions):
${trunc(input.acceptanceCriteria)}

WHAT WAS DONE (result of execution):
${trunc(input.resultText)}

═══════════════════════════════════════
MANDATORY VERIFICATION CHECKLIST
═══════════════════════════════════════

You MUST complete EVERY checkpoint below. After each checkpoint, include the ACTUAL output/evidence in your response. If you skip a checkpoint, the verdict is automatically FAILED. If any tool returns an error, report it honestly — do NOT fabricate success.

┌─ CHECKPOINT 1: CODE & BUILD HEALTH ───────────────────────────────
│
│ 1a. Use bash to run the project's lint command (npm run lint, ruff, etc).
│     → Paste the ACTUAL lint output.
│
│ 1b. Use bash to run typecheck (tsc --noEmit, npm run typecheck, mypy, etc).
│     → Paste the ACTUAL typecheck output.
│
│ 1c. Use bash to run the test suite (npm test, pytest, cargo test, etc).
│     → Paste the ACTUAL test results (pass/fail counts, any failures).
│
│ 1d. Use bash to run: git diff HEAD~1 --stat
│     → List the files that were changed.
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

┌─ CHECKPOINT 2: APPLICATION LOGS ────────────────────────────────────
│
│ 2a. Run: docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}"
│     → List ALL running containers.
│
│ 2b. For EVERY running container:
│     docker logs --tail 100 <container-name> 2>&1
│     → Paste the logs. Look for: errors, exceptions, warnings,
│       stack traces, segfaults, OOM, connection refused, timeouts.
│
│ 2c. If the project has log files (logs/*.log, *.log, etc):
│     Read the last 50 lines of each log file.
│     → Paste the log content. Flag any ERROR or WARN lines.
│
│ 2d. If the project is NOT running in Docker:
│     Check for running processes (ps aux | grep <project>),
│     check system logs (journalctl, /var/log, etc).
│     → Paste relevant output.
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

┌─ CHECKPOINT 3: RUNTIME BEHAVIOR (if criteria mention URL/browser/API)
│
│ 3a. Ensure the project is running (docker compose up -d or equivalent).
│     → Confirm containers/services are up.
│
│ 3b. Use curl to hit the relevant API endpoints.
│     → Paste the HTTP status code and response body.
│
│ 3c. If browser interaction is required:
│     Use Playwright MCP to:
│     - Navigate to the specified URL
│     - Perform ALL user actions described in criteria (click, type, submit)
│     - Verify the expected UI elements appear
│     - Capture browser CONSOLE LOGS (errors, warnings, console.error)
│     - Capture NETWORK errors (failed requests, 4xx, 5xx)
│     → Paste the console log output.
│     → Paste the page text content at each verification point.
│
│ 3d. After browser/API interaction, RE-CHECK docker logs again
│     for any NEW errors that appeared during the session.
│     → Paste any new errors found.
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

┌─ CHECKPOINT 4: CRITERIA-BY-CRITERIA VERIFICATION ────────
│
│ Go through EACH acceptance criterion ONE BY ONE:
│
│   Criterion: "<paste the exact criterion>"
│   Evidence:  "<what you observed, with specific values/URLs/output>"
│   Verdict:   PASS or FAIL
│   Reason:    "<why it passed or failed, be specific>"
│
│ Do this for EVERY criterion. Leave none unchecked.
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

═══════════════════════════════════════
FINAL VERDICT
═══════════════════════════════════════

Based on ALL evidence collected above, output EXACTLY:

VERIFICATION: PASSED

ISSUES: none

OR

VERIFICATION: FAILED

ISSUES:
- <specific issue 1 — what failed, where, how to reproduce>
- <specific issue 2>
- ...

CRITICAL RULES:
• You CANNOT return PASSED if you skipped any checkpoint
• You CANNOT return PASSED if lint/typecheck/tests have errors
• You CANNOT return PASSED if logs contain errors related to the changes
• You CANNOT return PASSED if any acceptance criterion is not met
• You MUST include evidence for every claim you make
• Do NOT change code — you are a VERIFIER, not a fixer

BEGIN VERIFICATION NOW. Start with CHECKPOINT 1.`

return {
  json: {
    sessionId: input.sessionId,
    taskKey: input.taskKey,
    chatId: input.chatId,
    originalPrompt: input.originalPrompt,
    acceptanceCriteria: input.acceptanceCriteria,
    workerAlias: input.workerAlias,
    workerBaseUrl: input.workerBaseUrl,
    authorizationHeader: input.authorizationHeader,
    sessionStatusPath: input.sessionStatusPath,
    messageListPath: input.messageListPath,
    promptAsyncPath: input.promptAsyncPath,
    verifyPrompt,
  },
}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { agent: 'verifier', parts: [{ type: 'text', text: $('Формируем промпт верификации').item.json.verifyPrompt }] } }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Извлекаем текст верификации из ответа OpenCode.
// API формат: message.info.role, message.info.id, message.parts

if ($itemIndex > 0) return null

const input = $('Формируем промпт верификации').item.json
const messages = $('Получаем сообщения верификации').all().map(({ json }) => json)

const assistantMessages = messages
  .filter((m) => String(m.info?.role || '') === 'assistant')
  .sort((left, right) => Number(left.info?.time?.created || 0) - Number(right.info?.time?.created || 0))

const verificationText = assistantMessages.length > 0
  ? assistantMessages.map((m) => {
      const parts = Array.isArray(m.parts) ? m.parts : []
      return parts
        .filter((p) => String(p.type || '') === 'text')
        .map((p) => String(p.text || p.content || '').trim())
        .join('
')
    }).join('

')
  : 'VERIFICATION: FAILED

ISSUES:
- OpenCode не вернул сообщений верификации.'

return {
  json: {
    taskKey: input.taskKey,
    chatId: input.chatId,
    originalPrompt: input.originalPrompt,
    acceptanceCriteria: input.acceptanceCriteria,
    workerAlias: input.workerAlias,
    verificationText,
  },
}

assignments.name: systemPrompt
assignments.value:
={{ `Ты — агент-судья. Прочитай результат верификации от OpenCode и определи: приёмка пройдена или нет.

Правила:
- Если написано VERIFICATION: PASSED и нет ошибок → PASSED
- Если написано VERIFICATION: FAILED или есть перечисленные ошибки → FAILED
- Не выдумывай ошибки, которых нет в тексте отчёта.
- Отвечай ТОЛЬКО чистым JSON объектом (без markdown, без \`\`\`, без пояснений):

{"verdict": "PASSED"|"FAILED", "reason": "краткая причина — что именно не так или почему всё хорошо"}

НЕ добавляй markdown. НЕ оборачивай в \`\`\`json. Только одна строка JSON.` }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Готовим fix-задачу при FAILED верификации.

const parent = $('Извлекаем вердикт').first().json
const fixTaskKey = `fix-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`
const fixPrompt = `FIX TASK — previous implementation failed acceptance verification.

ORIGINAL TASK:
${parent.originalPrompt}

VERIFICATION FAILED:
${parent.reason}

Please fix ALL the issues found in the verification. When you're done, the implementation will be re-verified against the original acceptance criteria.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (same as original):
${parent.acceptanceCriteria}`

const contextJson = JSON.stringify({
  acceptanceCriteria: parent.acceptanceCriteria,
  originalPrompt: parent.originalPrompt,
  source: 'verification',
  parentTaskKey: parent.taskKey,
})

return {
  json: {
    fixTaskKey,
    fixPrompt,
    contextJson,
    parentTaskKey: parent.taskKey,
    chatId: parent.chatId,
    workerAlias: parent.workerAlias,
    originalTaskKey: parent.taskKey,
    acceptanceCriteria: parent.acceptanceCriteria,
    verdict: parent.verdict,
    reason: parent.reason,
  },
}
